a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: The number of reported cases of cholera . Testing and reporting of cholera is limited in many countries.
Data source: WHO, Global Health Observatory (2022); WHO, Weekly Epidemic Reports (2023)
Note: In outbreak situations, cases of acute watery diarrhea caused by other pathogens may be reported as cholera cases when laboratory
confirmation is not available or feasible for all suspected cases.
